with:
  # Build clauses
      clauses: list[str] = [_main_clause(t.subject, t.predicate, _clean(t.object)) for t in triples]
  
      # Try to build a complex sentence that connects related entities
      # First, identify the main subject (usually the airport)
      main_subject = triples[0].subject if triples else ""
  
      # Find location-related triples that can be connected
      location_clauses = []
      other_clauses = []
  
      for i, t in enumerate(triples):
          clause = _main_clause(t.subject, t.predicate, _clean(t.object))
          # Check if this is a location-related predicate that can be connected
          if t.predicate in ["location", "country", "isPartOf", "cityServed", "administrativeArrond...
              location_clauses.append((i, clause, t.subject, t.object))
          else:
              other_clauses.append((i, clause, t.subject, t.object))
  
      # Build a complex sentence with proper connections
      if len(clauses) == 1:
          sentence = clauses[0] + "."
      else:
          # Sort location clauses to build a hierarchy
          location_clauses.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
          other_clauses.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
  
          # Build the main sentence starting with the first clause
          sentence_parts = []
          connected_entities = set()
